sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7346" key="a)nara/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναράομαι</orth>, <sense id="n7346.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">recall a curse,</tr_> Callisth. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
